empty.title: No transactions
empty.description: No transactions match the selected filters.

category_dialog.title: Categorize transaction
category_dialog.rule_hint: A rule will be created and applied to future imports.
category_dialog.rule_hint_similar: It will apply to this and {{count}} similar transactions, and create a rule.

rules.title: Classification rules
rules.subtitle: Rules you apply to your transactions. Create them here or while classifying from Transactions.
rules.empty_title: You don't have any classification rules yet
rules.empty_body1: Rules teach FinTrack to categorize your transactions automatically. Every time you classify a transaction and click “Create rule”, the rule shows up here.
rules.empty_body2: The more rules you create, the better FinTrack will classify your future imports — over time almost everything gets categorized on its own and you'll barely need to review.
rules.empty_body3: On top of that, your rules anonymously help classify other users' transactions, and theirs help classify yours. The more people take part, the smarter classification gets for everyone.
rules.empty_cta: To create your first rule: go to Transactions, open a transaction and click “Create rule”.
rules.delete_confirm: Delete this rule? It will no longer apply to future imports.
rules.community_hint: This rule contributes to the community classification.

fields.keyword_help: The rule applies to transactions whose description contains this text.
fields.amount_note: Leave both empty to apply to any amount. The amount is compared in absolute value.
